author: suctl
description: Manages nginx virtual hosts and per-domain availability state. SSL/ACME certificates are managed by suctl-mod-certbot.

capabilities.name: nginx.domain.add
capabilities.description: Add a new nginx-managed domain (creates server block, enables site).

capabilities.name: nginx.domain.list
capabilities.description: List all nginx-managed domains with state information.

capabilities.name: nginx.domain.suspend
capabilities.description: Suspend a domain by writing a high-priority conf.d override.

capabilities.name: nginx.domain.unsuspend
capabilities.description: Unsuspend a domain by removing its conf.d suspension override.

capabilities.name: nginx.maintenance.enable
capabilities.description: Enable maintenance mode for a domain (or all domains).

capabilities.name: nginx.maintenance.disable
capabilities.description: Disable maintenance mode for a domain (or all domains).

capabilities.name: nginx.reload
capabilities.description: Reload nginx configuration without dropping connections.

capabilities.name: nginx.domain.survey
capabilities.description: Render the ambient domain landscape for the survey, including the per-row DNS classification (dns column) and a dns-elsewhere count folded into the status summary. Each row is tagged with applicable facet values (status + ssl:state); core filters locally. Async — resolves every domain's DNS concurrently under one bounded deadline, so the survey is pushed via job_update when the work completes.

capabilities.name: nginx.domain.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected domain.

capabilities.name: nginx.provision
capabilities.description: Provision a new domain with nginx configuration and a Let's Encrypt certificate via certbot.

capabilities.name: nginx.source.survey
capabilities.description: Render the config-file landscape under sites-available for the source surface. The default file reports how many of its blocks are migratable.

capabilities.name: nginx.source.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected config file, including its contained server blocks.

capabilities.name: nginx.block.survey
capabilities.description: List the server blocks contained in one config file (drill child of the source surface).

params.name: scope
params.description: Config file name whose blocks to list

capabilities.name: nginx.source.migrate
capabilities.description: Lift server blocks out of the default site into their own per-domain files, then reload nginx. With all=true every migratable block moves; otherwise only the named block.

params.name: subject
params.description: Block primary server_name to migrate (or the default file name to migrate all)

params.name: all
params.description: Migrate every migratable block from default
